title: Add CSV export to the Todos page
body:
## Summary
Team admins keep asking for a way to get their todo list out of the app for reporting. This adds a one-click CSV export from the Todos page.

## What changed
- New `GET /todos/export.csv` endpoint that streams the current todo list as CSV (id, text, done).
- New "Export to CSV" button on the Todos page. Clicking it downloads the file and shows a confirmation banner ("Exported!") so the user knows it worked.

## Why
Closes the recurring support request for offline/spreadsheet access to todos.

linkedIssues.title: Users want to export their todos to a spreadsheet
linkedIssues.body: Several users have asked for a way to get their todo list into Excel/Sheets for reporting to their managers. We should support a simple CSV export from the Todos page.
